## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between BaseTen and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX presented their content generation platform (Atlas) and editorial process](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [BaseTen team provided feedback on content focus areas and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Product deep dive to be scheduled for next week to inform content creation](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Adjustments needed to content clusters and priorities based on BaseTen's core positioning](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

## Topics

### Content Generation Platform Overview

  - [Atlas platform used for content generation, including artifacts, research, and article creation](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Process includes assignment brief, research, outline, draft, fact-checking, and final output](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Human editors involved at key stages to ensure quality and alignment](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Content Source and Accuracy Concerns

  - [Mike raised concerns about blended context and outdated information in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Suggestion to avoid source material over a year old due to rapid changes in ML/AI field](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [GrowthX to investigate setting time frame limits on sources and providing citations](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)

### Content Distribution Strategy

  - [Discussion on whether new content will go on BaseTen blog or create a new area](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=817.0)
  - [Consideration of blog vs. guides section based on content length and technicality](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
  - [Guides offer SEO benefits with displayed copy and downloadable PDFs](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Editorial Content Strategy

  - [Focus on ML engineers and technical leaders as core audience](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Goal: Rank in top 10 for 15+ target inference keywords in first 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Position BaseTen as synonymous with fast inference and technical authority](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=961.0)
  - [Four initial content clusters identified, with team feedback on priorities](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Cluster Refinement

  - [Team discussion on adjusting cluster priorities and focus areas](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [Suggestion to de-emphasize GPU-specific content in favor of broader inference economics](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)
  - [Consideration of adding "build vs. buy" oriented content](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1470.0)
  - [Agreement to reshape GPU-related content to include BaseTen positioning](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

### Next Steps and Scheduling

  - [Product deep dive to be scheduled for next week (early morning preferred)](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [GrowthX to access BaseTen's brand style guides for design alignment](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Draft articles or topics to be presented next week for review](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
  - [Performance tracking and reporting setup to begin](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)

## Next Steps

  - [BaseTen team to provide feedback on content strategy document and artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=888.0)
  - [Schedule product deep dive for next week (early morning)](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Share brand style guides with GrowthX design team](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [GrowthX to adjust content clusters based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [BaseTen to provide access to Google Search Console, Analytics, and CMS](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1784.0)
  - [Next week: Review draft articles/topics and begin calibration process](https://fathom.video/share/2BJG36tH4pe_VP-zFDqFz78ZUri-VFkm?tab=summary&timestamp=1763.0)
